text.source_text: अथापि नाम प्रत्युच्चारणमन्येऽन्ये वर्णाः स्युः , तथापि प्रत्यभिज्ञालम्बनभावेन वर्णसामान्यानामवश्याभ्युपगन्तव्यत्वात् , या वर्णेष्वर्थप्रतिपादनप्रक्रिया रचिता सा सामान्येषु सञ्चारयितव्या । ततश्च नित्येभ्यः शब्देभ्यो देवादिव्यक्तीनां प्रभव इत्यविरुद्धम् ॥ २८ ॥
text.transliteration_iast: athāpi nāma pratyuccāraṇamanye'nye varṇāḥ syuḥ , tathāpi pratyabhijñālambanabhāvena varṇasāmānyānāmavaśyābhyupagantavyatvāt , yā varṇeṣvarthapratipādanaprakriyā racitā sā sāmānyeṣu sañcārayitavyā | tataśca nityebhyaḥ śabdebhyo devādivyaktīnāṃ prabhava ityaviruddham || 28 ||

translation.literal_translation: Even if one grants that each re-utterance involves different phoneme-individuals, one must still admit phoneme-universals as the basis of recognition. Then the meaning-conveyance procedure established for phonemes must be transferred to those universals. Therefore there is no contradiction in saying that divine individuals arise from eternal words. (28)
translation.technical_translation: Concluding compromise: whether varna-individuals are transient or recurrent, semantic function anchors in enduring varna-samanya; thus shabda-nityatva remains intact.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra-tail consolidates both linguistic models into the same nityatva outcome.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

A later philological pass should revisit technical choices around sphota/varna vocabulary in records 1.3.068 and 1.3.069.
